title: TaskPad
subtitle: Your tasks, everywhere — PWA and desktop in one codebase
description: A task manager built for speed and real-time collaboration. Local-first optimistic updates keep the UI instant while Firestore syncs everything in the background. Ships as both a PWA on Vercel and a native desktop app via Tauri, from a single React codebase with zero state libraries.
details: Real-time team collaboration with shared projects, pixel-art avatars and encrypted password vault
Built-in notes system with Markdown rendering and wikilink navigation
Local-first architecture — optimistic updates with debounced cloud sync
Custom drag-and-drop hooks for task, tab, and shortcut reordering
Ships as PWA and native desktop app (Tauri) from one codebase

title: Lar Nossa Senhora da Esperança
subtitle: Cinematic marketing site for a premium care home
description: A high-fidelity institutional website for a residential elderly care facility in Portugal. Built with scroll-driven GSAP animations, a warm custom design system, and a stacking card effect that turns service browsing into a tactile experience. Every detail — from the noise texture overlay to the four-font typographic hierarchy — is tuned to convey trust and warmth.
details: Scroll-triggered stacking card effect with pinned GSAP ScrollTrigger choreography
Custom design system — cream/stone/sage/rose palette with glassmorphism and noise overlay
Four-font typographic hierarchy: Cormorant Garamond, Inter, Outfit, IBM Plex Mono
Fully responsive with scroll-aware frosted-glass navbar and animated mobile menu
